description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pipeline that runs on push to master, hotfix/*, and tags matching v*, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch with an optional force_release input. The workflow has multiple jobs: tests running on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest with various Python versions and configurations; asan for address sanitizer tests on ubuntu-latest; build_sdist and build_wheel for building Python sdist and wheel on various platforms; and release for uploading to PyPI if a tag is pushed or force_release is true.
